hypotheses: H_mod_eq : eq (Nat.modulo a1 b) (Nat.modulo a2 b)
obligation.goal:
ex
  (fun q1 : nat =>
   ex
     (fun q2 : nat =>
      eq (Init.Nat.add a1 (Init.Nat.mul b q1))
        (Init.Nat.add a2 (Init.Nat.mul b q2))))

attempts: exists (Nat.div a2 b), (Nat.div a1 b). rewrite (Nat.div_mod_eq a1 b), (Nat.div_mod_eq a2 b), H_mod_eq. rewrite (Nat.add_assoc (b * (a1 / b)) (a1 % b) (b * (a2 / b))), (Nat.add_comm (a1 % b) (b * (a2 / b))), <- (Nat.add_assoc (b * (a1 / b)) (b * (a2 / b)) (a1 % b)). rewrite (Nat.add_assoc (b * (a2 / b)) (a1 % b) (b * (a1 / b))), (Nat.add_comm (a1 % b) (b * (a1 / b))), <- (Nat.add_assoc (b * (a2 / b)) (b * (a1 / b)) (a1 % b)). apply (Nat.add_cancel_r (a1 % b)). apply Nat.add_comm.

exists (Nat.div a2 b). exists (Nat.div a1 b). rewrite (Nat.div_mod_eq a1 b b_ne_0). rewrite (Nat.div_mod_eq a2 b b_ne_0). rewrite H_mod_eq. generalize (b * (a1 / b)) (b * (a2 / b)) (a1 mod b). intros x y r. omega.
failed_attempts: exists (Nat.div a2 b), (Nat.div a1 b). rewrite (Nat.div_mod_eq a1 b), (Nat.div_mod_eq a2 b), H_mod_eq. rewrite (Nat.add_assoc (b * (a1 / b)) (a1 % b) (b * (a2 / b))), (Nat.add_comm (a1 % b) (b * (a2 / b))), <- (Nat.add_assoc (b * (a1 / b)) (b * (a2 / b)) (a1 % b)). rewrite (Nat.add_assoc (b * (a2 / b)) (a1 % b) (b * (a1 / b))), (Nat.add_comm (a1 % b) (b * (a1 / b))), <- (Nat.add_assoc (b * (a2 / b)) (b * (a1 / b)) (a1 % b)). apply (Nat.add_cancel_r (a1 % b)). apply Nat.add_comm.

exists (Nat.div a2 b). exists (Nat.div a1 b). rewrite (Nat.div_mod_eq a1 b b_ne_0). rewrite (Nat.div_mod_eq a2 b b_ne_0). rewrite H_mod_eq. generalize (b * (a1 / b)) (b * (a2 / b)) (a1 mod b). intros x y r. omega.

visualization:
* (3 HYPS)|-ex
  (fun q1 : nat =>
   ex
     (fun q2 : nat =>
      eq (Init.Nat.add a1 (Init.Nat.mul b q1))
        (Init.Nat.add a2 (Init.Nat.mul b q2)))) (proven) (pruned) (done:True; cost:0.0; n_fail:0)
  # successful proof: pose (r := a1 mod b). assert (H1 : a1 = b * ((a1 - r)/b) + r /\ r < b).
{ apply (proj2 (div_mod_inv a1 b ((a1 - r)/b) r b_ne_0)). split; [reflexivity | split; [reflexivity | apply n_mod_b_le_n; exact b_ne_0]]. }
assert (H2 : a2 = b * ((a2 - r)/b) + r /\ r < b).
{ apply (proj2 (div_mod_inv a2 b ((a2 - r)/b) r b_ne_0)). sfirstorder use: Reflect.Nat_leb_le, Reflect.Nat_ge_leb, n_mod_b_le_n. }
destruct H1 as [H1_eq H1_lt], H2 as [H2_eq H2_lt]. exists ((a2 - r)/b), ((a1 - r)/b). sfirstorder.
